name: I fell from ladder on job, claim denied, now what in Salt Lake?
description: Appeal immediately to state commission; hire lawyer for 90% win rate.

mainEntity.name: I fell from ladder on job, claim denied, now what in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal immediately to state commission; hire lawyer for 90% win rate.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Appeal within 20 days (Utah) or 60 days (Idaho) to Labor Commission/Industrial Commission.**[1][6]

Common denials: delayed report, 'idiopathic' fall, pre-existing issues.

- Gather new evidence like witness affidavits.
- Request hearing with ALJ.

90% overturned with attorney representation.

Act fast—deadlines strict.
